body: - Remove `download bundle` button, as it is the same as `export memory` now - Remove `Bundled 119 events + seed` label - Sections to the left should be collapsable and when all expanded take up equal emount of space with separate scrolls, similar to how it done for some panels in VS Code. - `Prompts` should be renamed to `Example prompts`, and this section should contain actually all test cases we support the code, so by seeing examples user will have ability to see all the futures we support at the moment. - Also in `Demo` mode we should all the same examples + greeting. - Greetings and greetings responses should have some random variations configurable in settings. - `Who is Donald Trump?` works, but `Кто такой Илон Маск?` does not, that should be fixed. We should add more variations both to examples, and tests coverage, so for each supported feature we support wider range of natural language messages. - `Export memory` and `Export your memory` messages in all supported languages should be treated as click to `Export memory` button. - Attach file + `Import it as your memory` and `Import this file as your new memory` (and other variations + languages) should be treated as `import memory button`. Also we should support `Import memory`, `Import new memory`, `Import your new memory` as click to `import memory`, which will answer with a message like opening dialog, and open file selection dialog immediately, so user can select. - Also we need add `Conversations` section to the left and `New conversation` button on top, also on page referesh, or commining back after sometime we should keep showing last conversation. - Each conversation memory should be recorded separately in the entire memory of the system, so it should be able always recall any messages, when asked about previous message, first message, and also messages from other conversations in natural language. - We need to add summarize tool or skill, that will take any conversation, formalize it, and do actual logical summarization without any AIs (neural networks). - We need clear switcher between chat mode and agent mode, in agent mode agent receives task and operates autonomously taking requirements/goal converting it to plan and executing on it, by default all actions are executed in docker (or WebVM) so if user wants to access any data from the computer he is encouraged to copy these files to docker, where automatically git repository should be created, and after work is done we can ask user to accept or reject changes to his file system on his machine. - Agent should by default work in ask permissions mode on user's actual host machine, and autonomously inside docker/webvm, without user confirmation but with automatic git versioning after each and every change (that are meaningfully joined and accomplish single step of the plan. - We should prefer use data as rules/code or put code in data, and compile on execution. - Most of our code should be focused on interfacing with real world and between components. - Actual logic of the formal AI agent should be placed in seed data, as it should be configurable. - Most of the space in mobile view should be dedicated chat and input field, on top buttons should be containing only emojies (not labels), menu with all buttons + all left sidebar sections. So our system as a web app should be adaptable to mobile, tabled, notebook and desktop screens. We need to download all logs and data related about the issue to this repository, make sure we compile that data to `./docs/case-studies/issue-{id}` folder, and use it to do deep case study analysis (also make sure to search online for additional facts and data), in which we will reconstruct timeline/sequence of events, list of each and all requirements from the issue, find root causes of the each problem, and propose possible solutions and solution plans for each requirement (we should also check known existing components/libraries, that solve similar problem or can help in solutions). If there is not enough data to find actual root cause, add debug output and verbose mode if not present, that will allow us to find root cause on next iteration. If issue related to any other repository/project, where we can report issues on GitHub, please do so. Each issue must contain reproducible examples, workarounds and suggestions for fix the issue in code. Please plan and execute everything in this single pull request, you have unlimited time and context, as context auto-compacts and you can continue indefinitely, until it is each and every requirement fully addressed, and everything is totally done.
title: Fixes and improvements
